prompt: Using the two provided office selfie references, transform the scene into a square 1:1 drawing that looks like it was made by a child about 3 years old with crayons on white drawing paper. Use the references only for the composition, person/object placement, broad color choices, and background balance; do not recreate anything photorealistically. Keep the woman seated close to the camera in the office, with dark brown hair, a white blouse, the desk and monitor on the left, office shelves/files and coworkers in the background, and the overall selfie-like framing. Render everything as an enthusiastic toddler crayon drawing: rough scribbly outlines, uneven proportions, simple shapes, messy coloring outside the lines, visible wax texture, naive perspective, and incomplete details. Preserve the face-obscuring square as a flat skin-tone block over the face. Make the pose closer to REFERENCE_0, without the peace-sign hand from REFERENCE_1. Keep the palette simple and crayon-like, with white paper visible, no realistic lighting, no polished illustration style, no text, no watermark.
